purpose: Collect sanctioned evidence for search and selection
selection_criteria: evidence is sanitized versioned and linked to PR 101

purpose: Normalize searchable fields for decisions RACI workflow and org chart
selection_criteria: artifact has schema owner validator and stop condition

purpose: Filter out risky or gated candidates before selection
selection_criteria: candidate does not require live cost production secret permission tenant or clone movement

purpose: Assign gate rollback postcheck and stop condition to selectable candidates
search_scope: workflow org chart and decision matrix
selection_criteria: candidate has explicit gate none or named gate plus rollback and postcheck
decision is EXECUTE_ON_NEXT_LANE and has accountable responsible validator and disjoint scope

purpose: Separate non-executable gated decisions for human gate queue
selection_criteria: decision is KEEP_GATED REQUIRE_LIVE_GATE REQUIRE_HUMAN_GATE REQUIRE_WORKTREE_GATE or SERIALIZE

purpose: Build next-lane candidate set with exact files validators rollback and stop condition
selection_criteria: candidate set is versionable repo-scoped and validator-covered

purpose: Narrate only approved evidence and selection result after validation
selection_criteria: readback states what was selected not selected and why

purpose: Close search selection planning at PR review
selection_criteria: PR remains draft until human approval for ready or merge precheck
